"D:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Community\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\othello.dir/objects.a
E:\VSCODE\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\othello.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\othello.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\VSCODE\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\othello.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o othello.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libothello.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\othello.dir\linkLibs.rsp
